originalTitle: South Africa president faces call to resign after court ruling
title: South Africa president faces call to resign after court ruling
content: The Constitutional Court says MPs were was wrong to block impeachment proceedings against Cyril Ramaphosa.

originalTitle: 'I'd rather live in hiding in the US than return to Somalia'
title: 'I'd rather live in hiding in the US than return to Somalia'
content: Fear and uncertainty linger for Somali migrants in Minnesota despite a legal reprieve.

originalTitle: Ethiopian woman's joy at rare quintuplets after 12 years trying for a baby
title: Ethiopian woman's joy at rare quintuplets after 12 years trying for a baby
content: The woman, 35, says she was praying for a baby and was "overjoyed" to be "blessed with five at once".

originalTitle: Pentagon releases video of strikes on Iranian oil tankers
title: Pentagon releases video of strikes on Iranian oil tankers
content: Footage released by the Pentagon shows US strikes on two Iranian oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

originalTitle: Celebrated naturalist David Attenborough marks 100th birthday
title: Celebrated naturalist David Attenborough marks 100th birthday
content: Britain’s famed natural historian David Attenborough is celebrating his 100th birthday.

title: Costa Rica inaugurates right-wing president Laura Fernandez
content: Costa Rica inaugurated right-wing president Laura Fernandez on Friday as supporters gathered in the national stadium.

content: Abbas Araghchi says the US attacks each time there is a diplomatic solution on the table.

originalTitle: Trump says Russia and Ukraine to observe three-day ceasefire
title: Trump says Russia and Ukraine to observe three-day ceasefire
content: It comes as the two countries accused each other of violating separate ceasefires to cover the celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.

originalTitle: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
title: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
content: About 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.

originalTitle: Fernandes: The trophies, the assist record and his future
title: Fernandes: The trophies, the assist record and his future
content: No Premier League medal, no Champions League title, but Bruno Fernandes has won other trophies and many accolades, and the FWA footballer of the year is on the brink of setting a record.

content: The EFL charges Southampton with spying on Middlesbrough before they meet in the Championship play-off semi-finals on Saturday.

title: Iraola top of Palace shortlist for new manager
content: Bournemouth manager Andoni Iraola heads Crystal Palace's shortlist of candidates to replace outgoing head coach Oliver Glasner next season.
